description: You are a Network Operations Center (NOC) Manager tasked with migrating from a legacy Cacti monitoring system to Graphite. Recreate specific Cacti visual semantics by creating a Graphite dashboard named 'NOC Legacy View'. The dashboard must include a graph titled 'CPU Utilization (Cacti)' using the cactiStyle function on the wildcard metric servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*. It must also include a graph titled 'Traffic & I/O (Styled)' featuring servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in (green) and servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes (blue). Finally, include a graph titled 'Temperature with Baseline' showing servers.datacenter.machine_temperature with a lineWidth of 3 and an average aggregateLine baseline. Save the dashboard when complete.
